category_sources: source_facts.description says HEALPix is Hierarchical Equal Area isoLatitude Pixelization of a sphere; official HEALPix docs describe data analysis, simulations, and visualization on the sphere.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is healpix; official homepage and documentation brand it as HEALPix.
docs_sources: Official healpix.sourceforge.io HTML documentation index and installation guidelines.
repo_sources: Official HEALPix downloads page states source code can be browsed in the SourceForge SVN repository; source_facts.repo was empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable list; official HEALPix documentation describes the sphere pixelization and software package for analysis/visualization.
